title: Name Tag Recipe Backport
description: Backports the recipe for Name Tags introduced in 26.1 Snapshot 2.
body:
A simple mod that backports the recipe for Name Tags introduced in the second snapshot for version 26.1. Simply place a piece of paper into a crafting table with a (vanilla) metal nugget, and you'll find yourself with a newly created name tag for use on any of your blocky friends!

This mod is available for major releases from 1.17.1 to 1.21.8. It will not be updated for The Copper Age or Mounts of Mayhem drop.
